stories.headline: Allergy training to become compulsory across all schools in England, says government
stories.description: England schools will require allergy training starting in September.

stories.headline: Cyprus criticises UK response to drone strikes ahead of Healey visit
stories.description: The Cypriot government has criticised how the UK has handled information sharing after drone attacks.

stories.headline: Where are Iran’s allies? Why Moscow, Beijing are keeping their distance
stories.description: Russia and China have condemned the US-Israeli attack on Iran but stopped short of offering military support.

stories.headline: Drone targets US base in Iraq as Iran attacks hit region amid US-Israel war
stories.description: Iran continues to strike US assets in the region as Gulf Arab states report explosions, downing of drones.

stories.headline: US Senate vote fails to rein in Trump war powers on Iran
stories.description: The measure, passed largely along party lines, would halt US military action until approved by Congress.
